mapper.select: SELECT id AS roomId, name AS roomName FROM chat_room WHERE is_group_chat = 2

SELECT c.content AS message, m.member_id AS sender_id, m.member_name AS sender_name, m.member_thumb AS sender_thumb
FROM chat_message c INNER JOIN member_tbl m ON (c.member_id = m.id) WHERE chat_room_id = #{id} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC

SELECT * FROM chat_room WHERE id = (SELECT cp1.chat_room_id FROM chat_participant cp1 INNER JOIN chat_participant cp2 ON (cp1.chat_room_id = cp2.chat_room_id) WHERE cp1.member_id = #{memberId} AND cp2.member_id = #{otherMemberId}) AND is_group_chat = 1
